headline: Reflecting On Multi-Line Insurance Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: Hartford (NYSE:HIG)
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at multi-line insurance stocks, starting with Hartford (NYSE:HIG).
